title: Quran, Sura 4: An-Nisa
description: Sura 4 (An-Nisa: The Women) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 4 (An-Nisa: The Women) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: O mankind, fear your Lord, who created you from one soul and created from it its mate and dispersed from both of them many men and women.
